title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Natco Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
